proved: An explicit local-AI opt-out produces a disabled startup decision even when model files exist.
Opted-in startup with no text model requests setup; vision projector files do not satisfy it.
A saved text model is preferred and the largest downloaded text model is the deterministic fallback.
Legacy saves default local AI on and an explicit false value survives idempotent persisted-state merging.
The setup escape and accessible header-off state render from the production components without a browser.
The TypeScript production bundle and Rust native lifecycle compile together after native auto-start removal.
notProved: Packaged first-run pointer and keyboard interaction for Continue without local AI.
A process/VRAM observation proving restart with local AI off spawns no llama-server.
Packaged unload/reload interaction and memory release on supported GPUs.
Clean-install first generation; the existing S-03 decisive gate remains open.
